block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima sira si myesu sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mikwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,3@勅親王諸王諸百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣,*

block.header: kake maku mo kasikwo ki aki tu mi kamwi to imasu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo kimi ko no ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no waza wo kake maku mo kasikwo ki apumi no opo tu no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si sumyera mikoto no pazime tama pi sadame tama p yeru nori no manima ni uke tamapari te tukape mature to opose tama pi saduke tama peba itadaki ni uke tamapa ri kasikwo mi uke tamapa ri odi susumi mo sira ni sirizoki mo sira ni kasikwo mi masa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,2@倭根子天皇我皇此天日嗣高座之業乎,*

block.header: sikaru ni sumyera to imasi te ame no sita wosame tamapu kimi pa sakasi ki pito no yo ki omi wo e te si ame no sita woba tapirake ku yasurake ku wosamuru mono ni aru rasi to namo kikosi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,7@物尔在良之止奈母聞行湏,*

block.header: kare koko wo motite opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku ware pa tutana ku wodina ku aredomo mi kwo tati wo pazime te opo kimi tati omi tati no api ana napi matu ri api tasuke matura mu koto ni yori te si ko no opose tama pi saduke tama pu wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa tapirake ku yasurake ku tukape maturu be si to namo omoposi myesu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,4@王臣等乃相穴奈比奉利相扶奉牟,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,8@仕奉倍之止奈母所念行,*

block.header: koko wo motite peturapi azamuku kokoro na ku mame ni aka ki makoto wo motite sumyera ga mikadwo no tate tama p yeru wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa moro moro tasuke tukape mature to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,4@食国天下之政者衆助仕奉止宣,*

block.header: koto wakite nori tamapa ku ware pito ri nomwi ya yorokobo si ki taputwo ki opo mikoto wo uke tamapa mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕一人乃末也慶之岐貴岐,*

block.header: opoyoso pito no kwo no sakipapi wo kagapura maku pori su ru koto pa oya no tame ni to namo kikosi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@凡人子乃蒙福麻久欲為流,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,1@事波於夜乃多米尔止奈母聞行湏,*

block.header: kare koko wo motite wa ga mi oya taka nwo no opo tozi wo opo mi oya to mawosi te kagapuri kurawi age matu ri wosame matu ru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕親母高野夫人乎称皇太夫人弖,*

block.header: mata tukape maturu pito domo no naka ni si ga tukape maturu sama ni sitagapi te pito ri puta ri domo kagapuri kurawi age tama pi wosame tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,4@一二人等冠位上賜比治賜夫,*

block.header: mata opo mi kamwi no miya wo pazime te yasiro yasiro no negwi papuri domo ni kurawi pito sina tamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸社祢冝祝等尔給位一階,*

block.header: mata popusi no tukasa wo pazime te tera dera no tigyau no pito to tosi ya swodi ywori kamwi tu kata no popusi ama domo to ni mono podokosi tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸寺智行人及年八十已上僧尼等尔物布施賜夫,*

block.header: mata tosi taka ki pito madusi ki pito keugi aru pito domo wosame tamapi yasinapi tama pu
mata ame no sita kotosi no tadikara yurusi tamapa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又天下今年田租免賜久止宣,*
